events.title: NAB Show 2026
events.description: Meet the Primeasure team at NAB Show 2026, where we'll be representing Grass Valley. Find us at Booth C2408.
events.fullDescription: The Primeasure team will be present at NAB Show 2026 representing Grass Valley. Visit us at Booth C2408 to explore the latest broadcast and media technology solutions. NAB Show is the world's largest convention encompassing the convergence of media, entertainment, and technology.

events.title: Discover Advanced Memory Solutions
events.description: Learn about advanced memory solutions and best practices from our experts.
events.fullDescription: Join industry professionals for in-depth technical discussions and demonstrations.

events.title: IBC 2025
events.description: Join us at the world's most influential media, entertainment & technology show. Visit us at the GrassValley Booth Hall 9, Booth 9.A01.
events.fullDescription: Experience the future of broadcasting at IBC 2025. Connect with our team at the GrassValley booth.

events.title: Broadcast India 2025
events.description: Join us at the GrassValley booth to explore our latest broadcast solutions and meet our experts.
events.fullDescription: India's premier event for the Media & Entertainment industry. Visit us at the GrassValley booth.

events.title: AUTO EV BHARAT 2025
events.description: Join us as we represent Teledyne Lecroy and explore our test and measuring solutions catered for the automobile industry.
events.fullDescription: Discover advanced automotive testing solutions and connect with industry experts at India's premier EV expo.

events.title: PCIE Devcon 2025
events.description: Meet the PCIe community in Bangalore for two days of deep dives on compliance, testing, and interoperability.
events.fullDescription: Join PCI-SIG members, partners, and industry experts at Radisson Blu ORR for technical presentations, interoperability labs, and roadmaps covering PCIe technologies.

events.title: Advanced Oscilloscope Techniques for Power Devices and Motor Drives
events.description: Dive into oscilloscope best practices for power devices and motor drives—switching analysis, EMI debugging, and power integrity workflows.
events.fullDescription: Master advanced oscilloscope techniques for power electronics: decode motor drive waveforms, capture switching anomalies, measure efficiency, and debug EMI with Teledyne LeCroy tools and Primeasure experts.

events.title: Primeasure Sales Kickoff 2026
events.description: Kicking off the FY 2026 sales year with our channel partners and Primeasure teams.
events.fullDescription: Join Primeasure leadership and channel partners as we align on the FY 2026 sales strategy, launch priorities, and field enablement plans.

events.title: Beyond NRZ: Tackling Multi-Level Signaling Challenges in Next-Generation High-Speed Interfaces
events.description: Join Thanu Rajendran and Sadanand Bhatt as they explore PCIe Gen 6 multi-level signaling challenges using a combined Teledyne LeCroy and Anritsu solution.
events.fullDescription: Join Thanu Rajendran and Sadanand Bhatt as they explore PCIe Gen 6 multi-level signaling challenges using a combined Teledyne LeCroy and Anritsu solution.

events.title: Mastering Clock Jitter & Phase Noise Analysis Using Clock Expert
events.description: Clock performance is critical to reliable high-speed designs. See how Teledyne LeCroy Clock Expert measures clock jitter, phase noise, spread-spectrum clocks, and accumulated (n-cycle) jitter.
events.fullDescription: Clock performance is critical to the reliability of high-speed digital designs. In this webinar, we will explore how Clock Expert from Teledyne LeCroy enables accurate measurement and analysis of clock jitter, phase noise, spread-spectrum clocks, and accumulated (n-cycle) jitter—helping engineers validate timing margins and reduce risk.

events.title: PCIe Lab Days 2024 Recap
events.description: Our engineering teams hosted deep-dive sessions on PCIe compliance workflows, fixture selection, and automation best practices.
events.fullDescription: Hands-on lab demos covering SDA/TDME automation, high-speed probing, and compliance debugging. Reach out for the slides or to schedule a private workshop.
